overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair walking through Night City. The journey traverses under massive elevated highways, across sunlit intersections with digital billboards, and through narrow industrial alleys on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with massive concrete support pillars

events.description: silver vintage-style car drives past on the left side of the road
character walks past green street sign reading 'Brandon' mounted on a pole

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tinted sidewalk beneath the massive concrete overpass structure

notable_agents.action: silver vintage car driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive multi-level concrete overpass with exposed metal support beams casting heavy shadows
tall modern street lamp with distinctive orange accent lighting
dark colored utility van parked along the curb under the overpass
tall building with holographic advertisements visible in the distance between the overpass gaps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway structure in Night City, with the camera following the player character along a concrete sidewalk. The area is shadowed by the overpass above, with occasional shafts of sunlight breaking through. A silver vintage car passes on the left while the character walks past modern street lamps and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with digital billboards and crosswalk

events.description: exits the covered underpass into open intersection with direct bright sunlight
crossing the street at the white striped crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection diagonally from shadow into bright sunlight, moving toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright pink hair and red pants walking ahead and crossing the street
black sedan driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: large illuminated green digital billboard advertising 'ALL FOODS' and 'BURRITO XX' in red and yellow text
green street sign with white text reading 'Brandon' mounted on a metal pole

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the shadow of the overpass into a bright sunlit intersection. A large green 'All Foods' digital billboard dominates the right side while the character crosses the white-striped crosswalk. A pedestrian with distinctive pink hair walks ahead, and the massive highway structure recedes to the left as the scene opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley between concrete buildings with graffiti

events.description: entering narrow passage between tall industrial concrete buildings with metal grates
navigating around a utility box while continuing through the alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway between industrial buildings, passing green dumpsters and utility infrastructure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red cap and gray jacket walking in the opposite direction along the alley wall

entered.detail: tall gray concrete building wall with metal ventilation grates and colorful graffiti tags
green industrial dumpster with closed lid positioned against the building wall
metal scaffolding framework attached to the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow industrial alleyway flanked by tall concrete walls with metal grates and graffiti. The space is shadowed and enclosed, with green dumpsters and utility boxes lining the right wall. The elevated highway structure remains visible to the left while the character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban street with steam vents and distant holographic towers

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into a wider street with increased pedestrian and vehicle activity
steam vents releasing white vapor become visible ahead near the street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the busier street approaching an intersection with more pedestrian activity and visible steam vents

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the intersection ahead waiting to cross

entered.detail: industrial steam vent releasing white vapor into the air near the street level
tall skyscraper with large holographic advertisements and neon signage near the top
yellow public transit bus visible in the distance on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into a busier urban street with more open sky visible. Industrial steam vents release white vapor near the intersection ahead, while a distinctive holographic tower rises in the distance. The elevated highway structure recedes into the background as the character approaches a group of pedestrians and increased street traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the oppressive shadows of a massive overpass into the brilliant glare of a sunlit city intersection. It begins beneath the heavy concrete structure of an elevated highway, following the character along a sidewalk where shafts of light pierce through the gloom and a silver vintage car glides past. As the character moves forward, the oppressive ceiling of the overpass recedes to the left, allowing the environment to open up and the lighting to shift from deep shadow to bright daylight. The scene then expands into a wide intersection, where the camera tracks the character across a white-striped crosswalk toward a towering green All Foods digital billboard. Finally, the view opens fully to the bustling street as the character follows a pink-haired pedestrian into the vibrant, open urban landscape.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins in a shadowed corridor flanked by tall concrete walls, graffiti, and metal grates, moving past green dumpsters and a passing pedestrian. As the character advances, the enclosed space opens up, and the oppressive concrete walls give way to a brighter street with a more expansive view of the sky. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection where white vapor plumes from industrial steam vents and a holographic tower rises in the distance. Finally, the elevated highway structure recedes into the background as the camera merges into a crowd of pedestrians and increasing street traffic.
